title: Python memory route-report portable primitive reduction

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Move memory.route-report non-verbose JSON from a memory-specific generated runtime override to schema-backed portable operation primitives while keeping verbose/text package-domain fallback explicit.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not copy verbose/text route-report policy or fixture evaluation into generated code; generated output must be regenerated from contracts/generator changes; keep #892 larger completion open.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Close the slice after generated package, contract tooling, primitive, Python conformance, and node conformance proof pass.
completion_criteria: memory.route-report non-verbose JSON is expressed through portable operation IR primitives path.target_root.resolve, filesystem.exists, filesystem.glob, payload.assemble, and output.emit.
The old target_file_route_report_json_with_source_fallback generator override is removed.
Verbose/text route-report remains explicit package-domain fallback and is not counted as portable completion.
Generated outputs are regenerated and static/conformance proof passes.

goal: Move memory.route-report non-verbose JSON from a memory-specific generated runtime override to schema-backed portable operation primitives while keeping verbose/text package-domain fallback explicit.

execution_run.what happened: Added conditional execution, filesystem.exists, value-root globbing, and template payload assembly to command-generation primitive execution; moved memory.route-report non-verbose JSON to portable operation IR; removed the memory-specific target_file_route_report generated override; regenerated packages/adapters.
execution_run.scope touched: command-generation primitive/generator code, root contracts, memory route-report operation contract, generated outputs, focused tests/checks, and planning surfaces
execution_run.changed surfaces: generic primitive executor/generator plus generated memory operation output; no package source route-report policy changed
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_command_generation_primitive_executor.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --primitive-conformance; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; uv run ruff check packages/command-generation/src/command_generation/primitive_executor.py tests/test_command_generation_primitive_executor.py scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; rg -n "target_file_route_report_json_with_source_fallback|_tiny_route_report_payload_from_target_files|_tiny_route_report_payload" .; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --primitive-docker-conformance --require-docker
execution_run.result for continuation: route-report JSON generic primitive slice complete; verbose/text fallback remains package-domain debt
execution_run.next step: Commit/push and select the next #892 slice.
